diagrams.title: Hierarchy of Walks, Trails, and Paths

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Walks Paths and Trails</text>
  
  <!-- Walk -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Walk
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Path -->
  <rect x="160" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Path
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Trail -->
  <rect x="270" y="50" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Trail
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Graph nodes -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="150" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="153" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="180" cy="150" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="180" y="153" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="260" cy="150" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="260" y="153" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="320" cy="150" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="320" y="153" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Edges -->
  <line x1="115" y1="150" x2="165" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="195" y1="150" x2="245" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="275" y1="150" x2="305" y2="150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Example paths -->
  <path d="M100 165 Q140 200, 180 165" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <path d="M180 165 Q220 200, 260 165" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="50" y="230" width="120" height="80" fill="white" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <text x="110" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Legend
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="70" cy="270" r="5" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="90" y="273" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Vertex
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <line x1="65" y1="285" x2="75" y2="285" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="90" y="288" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Edge
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="230" width="120" height="80" fill="white" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <text x="310" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Types
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="260" y="270" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Walk: Repeated vertices OK
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="260" y="285" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Path: No repeated vertices
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="260" y="300" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Trail: No repeated edges
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
